overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a desert residential sidewalk during golden hour, approaching and crossing a multi-lane intersection with the Arasaka dam visible in the background. The scene features warm sunset lighting, palm trees, and moderate vehicle traffic passing by.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desert residential sidewalk during golden hour, passing palm trees and utility poles. A green sports car drives past on the right while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The massive red rock formation looms in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a desert intersection with the Arasaka dam wall becoming prominent in the background. A dark SUV passes by on the street as crosswalk markings come into view. The residential buildings fall behind as the open intersection approaches.

events.description: character steps off the curb and enters the crosswalk
multiple vehicles including a red sports car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection at the marked crosswalk

traffic light suspended over the intersection on wires

segments.scene_description: The character enters the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection. The Arasaka dam shifts to the right side of the frame as the character moves through the intersection. A red sports car and other vehicles pass through the intersection while overhead traffic lights hang above.

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past through the intersection
character approaches the opposite curb while looking around at traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection while observing passing traffic and approaching the far sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the intersection, navigating through moderate traffic including a yellow taxi and white sedan. The camera pans slightly to observe the surroundings while approaching the opposite sidewalk. The red rock formation and Arasaka dam remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet desert residential sidewalk into the heart of a bustling multi-lane intersection under the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and utility poles as a green sports car speeds by and a massive red rock formation looms in the distance. As the residential buildings fall behind, the camera approaches a wide intersection where the Arasaka dam wall becomes a prominent fixture of the skyline and a dark SUV passes through the frame. The scene then shifts as the character enters the crosswalk, moving through the intersection while overhead traffic lights hang above and the dam wall slides toward the right side of the view. Finally, the camera pans slightly to observe the surrounding traffic, including a yellow taxi and white sedan, as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk with the red rocks and dam still visible in the background.
